# Mobile Home Park Insurance

> Commercial insurance for mobile home park owners and manufactured housing community operators — through Contractors Choice Agency, an independent broker licensed in all 50 states.

## What This Site Is

mobilehomeparkinsurance.com is a lead-generation and informational website operated by Contractors Choice Agency (CCA), an independent insurance broker based in Chandler, AZ. The site helps mobile home park (MHP) owners and manufactured housing community (MHC) operators find and purchase the right commercial insurance coverage for their parks.

## Who This Is For

- Mobile home park owners (lot-lease parks)
- Manufactured housing community (MHC) operators
- RV park and mixed MH/RV park owners
- Park-owned home (POH) landlords
- Age-restricted (55+) manufactured housing communities
- Investors with MHC portfolios across multiple states

## Coverage Lines Offered

- **Commercial General Liability** — Slip-and-fall and bodily injury claims in park common areas, roads, walkways, clubhouses, and laundry facilities
- **Commercial Property** — Clubhouse, laundry building, maintenance office, park roads, signage, utility systems (water, sewer, electrical pedestals), and park-owned homes
- **Loss of Rental Income** — Replaces lost lot rent or unit rent when a covered event forces lots offline during the repair period
- **Workers' Compensation** — For maintenance workers, office staff, and groundskeepers employed by the park
- **Commercial Umbrella** — Excess liability above GL and other underlying policies; $1M–$10M+ additional limits
- **Flood Insurance** — Separate policy through NFIP or private markets for parks in or near FEMA flood zones

## Key Facts

- Mobile home park owners do NOT insure individual tenant homes — tenants insure their own units under HO-7 policies
- Park-owned homes (POHs) must be listed on the commercial property policy
- Standard commercial property policies exclude flooding — separate flood coverage is required for at-risk parks
- Workers' Comp is required in most states for any employees, including part-time staff
- Commercial umbrella is strongly recommended due to elevated premises liability exposure in MHPs

## About Contractors Choice Agency

Contractors Choice Agency is an independent insurance broker specializing in commercial and specialty insurance niches. The agency is licensed in all 50 states and works with A-rated carriers across admitted and surplus lines markets. Founder: Josh Cotner.
